subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Verily, he who was named after the Prince of Martyrs hath ascended unto Thy most glorious Kingdom, seeking shelter in the sanctuary of Thy mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان سمی سید الشهداء قد عرج الی ملکوتک الابهی مستجیرا بجوار رحمتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
